member.name: T:Hazina.Demo.AgenticOrchestration.Authentication.BasicAuthenticationHandler
member.summary: Basic HTTP Authentication handler. Validates credentials from the Authorization header against configuration.

member.name: P:Hazina.Demo.AgenticOrchestration.Authentication.BasicAuthenticationOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Whether authentication is enabled. If false, all requests are allowed.

member.name: P:Hazina.Demo.AgenticOrchestration.Authentication.BasicAuthenticationOptions.Realm
member.summary: The realm shown in the browser's login dialog

member.name: T:Hazina.Demo.AgenticOrchestration.Authentication.BasicAuthenticationExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering basic authentication

member.name: T:Hazina.Demo.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.ChatController
member.summary: Chat API controller for AI-powered terminal orchestration assistant. Provides a conversational interface with tools for managing terminal sessions.

member.name: M:Hazina.Demo.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.ChatController.SendMessage(Hazina.Demo.AgenticOrchestration.Controllers.ChatRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send a chat message and receive a streaming response. The AI assistant can use tools to manage terminal sessions.

member.name: T:Hazina.Demo.AgenticOrchestration.Security.InputSanitizer
member.summary: Input sanitization utilities to prevent command injection and other security vulnerabilities.

member.name: M:Hazina.Demo.AgenticOrchestration.Security.InputSanitizer.TryValidateSessionId(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Validates and sanitizes a session ID.
member.returns: True if valid and sanitized successfully

member.name: M:Hazina.Demo.AgenticOrchestration.Security.InputSanitizer.TrySanitizeCommand(System.String,System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Sanitizes a command string for terminal execution. IMPORTANT: This does NOT make arbitrary user input safe for shell execution. Use only for validated, limited command sets.

member.name: M:Hazina.Demo.AgenticOrchestration.Security.InputSanitizer.TrySanitizeString(System.String,System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Sanitizes a general string parameter (for archive IDs, titles, etc.)

member.name: M:Hazina.Demo.AgenticOrchestration.Security.InputSanitizer.TryValidateInteger(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Validates an integer parameter is within safe bounds.

member.name: M:Hazina.Demo.AgenticOrchestration.Security.InputSanitizer.EscapeForLogging(System.String)
member.summary: Escapes a string for safe logging (prevents log injection).
